body.Title: Grocery Delivery App
body.Description: A grocery delivery app that needed improvements to work smoothly. Customers faced delays, crashes, and tracking issues, while delivery partners and stores struggled to manage multiple orders. We revamped the app to make ordering, tracking, and delivery reliable and efficient.

content.text: A grocery delivery app that needed improvements to work smoothly. Customers faced delays, crashes, and tracking issues, while delivery partners and stores struggled to manage multiple orders. We revamped the app to make ordering, tracking, and delivery reliable and efficient.

The project focused on revamping an existing grocery delivery app that was not performing well. Customers experienced delayed deliveries, app crashes, and problems with real-time tracking. Delivery partners and stores faced issues managing multiple orders at once, causing clashes and confusion. Our goal was to fix these problems, improve the user experience, and make the app work smoothly for everyone involved. After updating the technology and improving workflows, the app now handles multiple orders efficiently, tracks deliveries accurately, and runs reliably even during busy hours.

The existing app had several issues that affected both customers and delivery staff. Customers often faced delays in receiving their orders, the app would crash unexpectedly, and real-time tracking didn’t work correctly. Delivery partners struggled with overlapping orders and missed deliveries, while store managers found it difficult to manage inventory and coordinate multiple orders at the same time. These problems led to frustration, missed orders, and a poor overall experience for users.

We completely revamped the app to fix all performance and operational issues. The app now runs reliably without crashes, tracks orders in real time, and handles multiple orders efficiently. Customers can place orders and receive accurate delivery updates, while delivery partners can manage trips without overlaps. Store managers can now monitor inventory, track orders, and coordinate deliveries smoothly. The improvements ensure that everyone customers, delivery staff, and store managers has a seamless and dependable experience.

React was used to create a fast and smooth user interface. It makes screen transitions quick and easy. Users can see ride updates, maps, and booking details in real time. This gives a better experience for both passengers and drivers.

Node.js runs the backend and handles real-time operations. It helps match rides quickly, send notifications instantly, and exchange data fast. The system stays reliable even when many people use it at the same time. This keeps the app smooth for everyone.

Ruby manages the main business logic, including ride workflows, fare calculations, driver operations, and admin tasks. Its simple and organized structure keeps the backend stable, easy to maintain, and flexible for future updates.

Java is used for important & secure parts of the application, including transaction handling and critical system processes. It ensures data is processed safely and all essential features work smoothly. Java also supports high performance and keeps the app stable even under heavy usage.

To make the grocery delivery app reliable, fast, and capable of handling multiple orders simultaneously, we selected technologies that support real time functionality, high performance, and long term maintainability. Each technology was chosen based on the specific needs of the platform and the role it plays in the overall system.

The Customer App was redesigned to be simple and reliable. Users can now browse products, place orders without delays, and track their deliveries accurately in real time. The app provides notifications for order updates and estimated delivery times, making the shopping experience smooth and predictable.

The Delivery Partner App helps delivery staff manage multiple orders without confusion. They receive clear notifications for new orders, can plan delivery routes effectively, and update order statuses in real time. The improvements prevent order clashes and make managing deliveries much easier.

The Admin Panel allows store managers and platform administrators to oversee operations efficiently. They can track all orders, manage delivery partners, update product inventory, and resolve customer issues quickly. The panel ensures smooth coordination between customers, delivery partners, and stores, improving the overall performance of the app.

body.Title: On-Demand Taxi Booking App Case Study
body.Description: A scalable and user-friendly taxi booking application designed to simplify real-time ride booking, driver matching, and fare management. The solution focuses on performance, reliability, and seamless user experience for both riders and drivers across urban environments.

content.text: A scalable and user-friendly taxi booking application designed to simplify real-time ride booking, driver matching and fare management. The solution focuses on performance, reliability and seamless user experience for both riders and drivers across urban environments.

This project focuses on building an on demand taxi booking application that helps users book rides easily and quickly. The app allows passengers to find nearby drivers, check ride details, and track trips in real time. It also includes separate panels for drivers and admins to manage rides, payments, and daily operations. The main goal was to create a simple, reliable, and easy to use system that works smoothly even during busy hours.

Many people face challenges when booking a taxi in busy cities. Riders often struggle to find available drivers nearby, leading to long waiting times and frustration. Tracking the ride in real time, understanding fare estimates, and making secure payments can also be confusing for users.

On the other side, drivers face difficulties getting consistent ride requests, managing multiple trips, and keeping track of earnings efficiently. Admins of taxi services also have challenges monitoring the entire system, handling disputes, and ensuring smooth daily operations. Overall, there was a need for a system that could simplify the ride booking process for passengers, drivers, and service managers alike.

To solve these challenges, we developed a taxi booking app that connects passengers and drivers in real time, making the ride process simple and reliable. The app allows passengers to quickly locate nearby drivers, book rides, track the journey, and make secure payments without any confusion. At the same time, drivers can receive ride requests in real time, manage their trips efficiently, and keep track of their daily earnings. The admin panel helps service managers monitor all rides, manage payments, and handle customer issues effectively. By integrating all users into a single platform, the app reduces waiting times, improves communication, and ensures a smooth, reliable experience for everyone involved.

React was used to create a fast and smooth user interface. It makes screen transitions quick and easy. Users can see ride updates, maps, and booking details in real time. This gives a better experience for both passengers and drivers.

Node.js runs the backend and handles real-time operations. It helps match rides quickly, send notifications instantly, and exchange data fast. The system stays reliable even when many people use it at the same time. This keeps the app smooth for everyone.

Ruby manages the main business logic, including ride workflows, fare calculations, driver operations, and admin tasks. Its simple and organized structure keeps the backend stable, easy to maintain, and flexible for future updates.

Java is used for important & secure parts of the application, including transaction handling and critical system processes. It ensures data is processed safely and all essential features work smoothly. Java also supports high performance and keeps the app stable even under heavy usage.

To build a reliable and scalable on demand taxi booking application, we selected technologies that support real time functionality, high performance, and long term maintainability. Each technology was chosen based on the specific needs of the platform and the role it plays in the overall system.

The Admin Panel provides a complete overview of the taxi booking system. Administrators can monitor all rides, manage drivers, track payments, and resolve any customer issues quickly. The panel helps streamline operations, maintain service quality, and ensure smooth communication between passengers and drivers, making it easier to manage the entire platform efficiently.

The Driver App helps drivers manage their rides efficiently and stay connected with passengers. Drivers can receive ride requests in real time, see the pickup and drop-off locations, and navigate the route easily. The app also allows drivers to track their daily earnings and manage trips, helping them plan their workday effectively and maintain a consistent workflow.

The Customer App is designed to make booking a taxi quick and easy. Users can search for nearby drivers, view ride details, track their ride in real time, and make secure payments without any hassle. The app provides fare estimates before booking and notifications about the driver’s location and arrival time, ensuring a smooth and convenient experience for passengers.

body.Title: Simple Online Doctor
body.Description: Simple Online Doctor is an Australia based digital healthcare platform that enables users to consult qualified doctors online through secure assessments and video or voice consultations. we improved the platform by enhancing functionality, automation, and overall user experience to make healthcare access faster and easier.

content.text: Simple Online Doctor is an Australia based digital healthcare platform that enables users to consult qualified doctors online through secure assessments and video or voice consultations. we improved the platform by enhancing functionality, automation, and overall user experience to make healthcare access faster and easier.

BannerImage.alt: Main project Overview SOH case study

meta_data.alt: Main project Overview SOH case study

content.text: Simple Online Doctor wanted to improve their existing website to better support online healthcare services. The platform had limited builder functionality, manual processes, and dependency on third-party tools for key features like reviews, team management, and content updates.

Simple Online Doctor was operating on a website built using a limited page builder that did not support advanced functionality. Key features such as navigation control, team management, and review handling were dependent on third party tools or manual processes.

User experience issues were also present. The sign up and registration flow lacked proper mobile number validation, address entry was manual and error prone, and profile verification required extra effort from users. Managing treatments, doctor information, and marketing pages was time consuming due to raw data and the absence of automation.
Overall, the platform needed better scalability, automation, and a smoother experience for both users and administrators.

We enhanced the Simple Online Doctor platform by building custom functionality directly into the builder CMS. We upgraded the navigation system, removed third party review dependencies, and developed a fully dynamic review component.

We created a dedicated team page along with individual doctor profile pages, making it easier to manage and display medical professionals. To handle large amounts of raw content from the old website, we used JSON based automation scripts to migrate and structure data efficiently within the builder.

User experience was improved by adding mobile number validation with country code dropdowns, integrating address verification APIs, and enabling address auto completion in user profiles. We also built a complete treatments section explaining all available medical services and developed multiple landing pages to support digital marketing campaigns.
The final result is a secure, scalable, and user friendly healthcare platform that simplifies online consultations and backend management.

Builder.io was used as the core visual CMS to give the Simple Online Doctor team full control over content without relying on developers. It allows easy creation and management of pages such as treatments, doctor profiles, reviews, and marketing landing pages.

Next.js powers the frontend of the application, ensuring fast page loads, smooth navigation, and improved SEO performance. Its server-side rendering and optimized routing make the platform reliable and scalable, supporting both patient facing pages and admin managed content efficiently.

Radix UI was used to build accessible and consistent UI components. It helped create reliable elements such as modals, dropdowns, forms, and navigation controls while maintaining accessibility standards, which is essential for a healthcare platform.

Tailwind CSS was used for styling to maintain a clean, responsive, and modern design system. It allowed rapid UI development, consistent layouts, and easy customization across devices, ensuring a smooth user experience for patients and administrators alike.

To build a modern, scalable, and easy to manage digital healthcare platform, we selected technologies that support performance, flexibility, and long term content control. Each tool was chosen to improve both user experience and administrative efficiency.

The homepage provides a clear overview of the platform, guiding users through online healthcare services. It highlights available treatments, doctor profiles, and the consultation process in a clean, structured layout for a smooth and reliable user experience.

body.Title: Alamo Tees

content.text: Alamo Tees is a custom apparel and promotional merchandise platform that allows businesses and individuals to design, personalize, and order branded products with ease. The platform delivers a smooth and intuitive customization experience, enabling users to create high quality personalized merchandise without complexity.

We designed and developed the Alamo Tees platform from the ground up, transforming a limited and rigid system into a modern, scalable, and user-friendly customization solution. The client required a powerful design studio, structured product management, a seamless ordering flow, and enterprise level scalability. Our objective was to build a high performance digital platform that delivers effortless customization, accurate pricing, and a smooth checkout experience across all devices.
The client’s previous platform faced several business and technical challenges that negatively impacted usability, customization flexibility, and operational efficiency.

The design customization options were limited, restricting user creativity and personalization. Product organization lacked structure, making navigation and product discovery difficult. The ordering flow was complex and unclear, which resulted in customer drop-offs. Pricing calculations were not dynamic and failed to adapt based on print location, decoration method, and quantity. Additionally, the system was not designed to scale, limiting future business growth and enterprise-level operations.
To overcome these challenges, We delivered a fully custom-built ecommerce and product customization platform designed for performance, flexibility, and scalability.
We developed a modern UI/UX framework to ensure smooth navigation and an intuitive user journey. A powerful
was built to support advanced product personalization. Product data was restructured using intelligent categorization and filtering for easier discovery.

and estimation calculators were integrated to provide accurate cost calculations. A secure and scalable checkout workflow was implemented using Shopify and Laravel to ensure reliable order processing.

Sanity was used as the headless content management system to provide flexible content control, real-time editing, & structured data management. It enables seamless updates and allows teams to manage content efficiently without development dependency.

Next.js powers the frontend of the platform, ensuring fast page loads, smooth navigation, and optimized performance. Its server-side rendering and efficient routing architecture deliver a highly responsive experience across all pages and user interactions.

Laravel serves as the backend engine, managing business logic, order workflows, and system integrations. It ensures secure data processing, reliable API communication, and scalable backend operations to support high-volume transactions.

Shopify handles the checkout and payment processing layer, providing secure transactions and reliable order handling. Its robust infrastructure ensures smooth checkout experiences, high security standards, and seamless integration with backend systems.

To build a modern, scalable, and easy-to-manage ecommerce platform, we selected technologies that support performance, flexibility, and long term growth. Each tool was carefully chosen to enhance both user experience and backend efficiency.

A clean and modular page architecture was implemented to ensure easy navigation, faster performance, and long-term scalability. Each section of the platform is designed as a reusable module, allowing simple updates and effortless expansion.

An intelligent product discovery experience was built using structured categories, brand-based navigation, and dynamic search. This enables users to explore products easily and reach relevant results with minimal effort.
Each product page provides clear product details, real-time price estimation, and direct access to the Design Studio, guiding users smoothly from product selection to personalization.

A fully custom-built Design Studio enables users to personalize products in real time with full creative control. The experience delivers accurate previews and a smooth design workflow aligned with real production processes.
The system supports dynamic handling of multiple color variants, allowing users to preview, customize, and manage different product versions within a single workflow, ensuring design consistency.

Automated workflows were developed to align with real-world screen printing and embroidery processes. This ensures accurate design preparation, precise quantity input, and reliable price calculation before order placement.
A smooth cart and checkout experience was built using Shopify for secure payments and Laravel for backend order handling, ensuring reliable processing and seamless transaction flow.
A centralized dashboard allows users to manage their entire order lifecycle, including order history, detailed order views, design previews, and real-time status tracking.

A global inquiry system was built to simplify communication between customers and Alamo Tees representatives, enabling faster support, smoother collaboration, and better handling of customization and bulk order requests.

The platform is built on a modular and scalable architecture that supports real-time customization, dynamic pricing, and seamless order management, delivering a smooth experience from browsing to checkout.

Admin dashboard helps manage and track all orders from one central place. It allows admins to easily view order details, monitor payment status, track deliveries, and manage customer information. The system is designed to simplify daily operations, reduce manual work, and ensure smooth order processing.

body.Title: Uplisting
body.Description: Uplisting is property management platform designed for short-term rental businesses. It helps property managers manage bookings, automate guest communication, handle payments, and scale operations efficiently. Our work focused on improving pricing clarity, user engagement, and conversion tracking through targeted page redesigns and new feature implementations.

content.text: Uplisting is property management platform designed for short-term rental businesses. It helps property managers manage bookings, automate guest communication, handle payments, and scale operations efficiently. Our work focused on improving pricing clarity, user engagement, and conversion tracking through targeted page redesigns and new feature implementations.

This project focused on enhancing key business pages of the Uplisting platform to improve user experience, conversions, and tracking. The goal was to redesign and build a flexible pricing system, create a full resources section, and optimize lead generation through better CTAs and analytics tracking. All improvements were made while keeping performance, scalability, and clarity at the core.

Our Client faced several limitations that affected user experience, conversions, and tracking accuracy. The pricing page lacked flexibility, making it difficult for users to compare monthly and yearly plans or view pricing in their preferred currency. Resource content was scattered and not designed for engagement or lead generation.

Additionally, there was no structured system to capture asset downloads or track user interactions across primary, secondary, and micro CTAs. This made it challenging to measure campaign performance, user journeys, and conversion effectiveness accurately.

We redesigned and rebuilt key sections of the platform with a strong focus on clarity, flexibility, and data-driven decision-making. A new pricing page was developed with monthly and yearly plan toggles and currency-based switching for global users.

A full resources page was created, featuring sliders and dynamically fetched blog content to keep information up to date. We also added a gated asset download form on the homepage hero section to improve lead capture.

To enable accurate tracking, UTM parameters were implemented across all CTA types, ensuring better visibility into user behavior, campaign performance, and conversion paths. These improvements delivered a more scalable, measurable, and conversion-focused platform.

Webflow was used to manage page layouts and content with full design flexibility. It allows the marketing team to update pages, launch new sections, and adjust layouts without developer dependency. This made it easier to iterate quickly on pricing pages, resources & landing pages.

Jetboost was implemented to add dynamic filtering, searching, and real-time content updates. It helped power dynamic resource listings and sliders by fetching and displaying blog content automatically. This reduced manual updates and ensured content stayed fresh & relevant for users.

Intercom was integrated to support customer communication and onboarding. It enables real-time chat, automated messages, and support interactions, helping users get quick assistance and improving overall engagement across the platform.

Calendly was used to simplify meeting and demo scheduling. It allows users to book calls directly based on availability, removing back-and-forth communication and improving the sales and onboarding experience.

To support a growing, global property management platform, we selected technologies that focus on performance, flexibility, and easy content management. Each tool was chosen to improve user experience, simplify marketing workflows, and enable scalable growth without adding technical complexity.

This section highlights the three main pages where our work had the greatest impact: the homepage, pricing page, and free resources page. Each page was redesigned to improve usability, clarity, and engagement. The homepage guides users clearly and presents key features, the pricing page makes plans and options easy to understand, and the free resources page showcases dynamic content to encourage exploration. BannerImage.alt: Umrah and Hajj Travels Project Overview

meta_data.alt: Umrah and Hajj Travels Project Overview

content.text: Umrah and Hajj Travels was developed as a complete redesign from scratch. The goal was to replace an outdated website with a fast, modern, and user-friendly platform. The new website helps users easily explore travel packages, understand what is included, and make bookings online. Along with a fresh design, the focus was on performance, smooth navigation, and easy content management for long-term use.

The previous website was outdated and did not meet modern user expectations. It had a slow loading speed, unclear navigation, and limited flexibility for managing travel packages. Users found it difficult to understand package details, and there was no proper online booking flow. Content updates required technical support, which made regular changes time-consuming and inefficient.

We rebuilt the entire platform from the ground up with a modern and scalable approach. Using Next.js and Tailwind CSS, we created a fast, clean, and responsive user interface. Sanity CMS was implemented to allow easy management of travel packages and content without developer dependency.

An all in one online booking system was added where packages include travel, accommodation, and services. We also integrated a secure contact form with SMTP to ensure reliable communication. The result is a smooth, high performance platform that is easy to manage and simple for users to book their journey.

Sanity CMS was used as the headless content management system to manage travel packages, hotel details, travel information, and website content. It allows the admin team to update packages, pricing, and content in real time without developer support. This ensures quick updates and accurate information for users planning their journey.

Next.js powers the frontend of the website, delivering fast page loads, smooth navigation, and strong SEO performance. Its server-side rendering and optimized routing help ensure a reliable experience across all devices, making it easy for users to browse packages, view details, and complete bookings efficiently.

Tailwind CSS was used to design a clean, modern, and fully responsive interface. It enabled consistent styling across the website and helped build reusable UI components quickly. The result is a smooth and visually clear experience that works well on mobile, tablet, and desktop devices.

To build a modern, fast, and easy to manage travel booking platform, we selected technologies that focus on performance, flexibility, and long-term content control. Each tool was chosen to improve both the user booking experience and the admin content management workflow.

BannerImage.alt: Umrah and Hajj Travels Package & Hotel Catalog

meta_data.alt: Umrah and Hajj Travels Package & Hotel Catalog

content.text: The booking catalog displays multiple travel packages with different hotels and available travel dates. Users can easily explore options and select a package that fits their schedule. Each hotel listing has a booking button that leads to a detailed page showing pricing, accommodation details, distance from Makkah and Madinah, and flight information. In the next step, users enter booking details such as the number of rooms, adults, and children. After completing the form, the booking is successfully submitted through a smooth and guided process.
